Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the closet. My stuff[n]is packed away inside...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should put my stuff away in the closet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I check the stuff[n]I put inside the closet...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You will now receive your downloadable content.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't feel so good...[n]I should go to bed early...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You will now receive your downloadable content.[n]{f 1 1}
